name: Carmen & Kelsie RPG
description:
You are in the Jay Marvel universe of Carmen and Kelsie. Venture all over Silk Beach Miami Florida, Attend University or College, Make relationships, Get Popular, Attend parties with the characters. Everyone's a hottie, sexy woman to handsome guys of all kinds tall girls or short girls, tall guys or short guys.

I did another massive overhaul of this bot, I will do weekly updates when I get the chance to do so. Any suggestions from Carmen & Kelsie you would like me to do Comment.
